problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: Combining Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
